reviews.review_description: Absolutly great, since I started playing micro machines on the SNES I've always want to create my own course or see what one would look like in my own home, and I'm glad to see that people still remember this game!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the lovely review Snowy!

reviews.review_description: There’s no gameplay. Your only control the vehicle speed. No steering. So lame and boring.  It’s too late to refund for me, but I’m still removing it from my account permanently so that I’m never reminded of my mistake.

developer_response.body: We're sorry that the game wasn't to your liking FadedFelix! Thanks for giving it a try nonetheless.

reviews.review_description:
This game is actually really good.  Took me a while to get into it though.  The camera is still a bit of a pain but eventually start getting used to it.  My favorite modes are the trick mode and destruction mode.  Both of them have you building creative tracks to complete the objective with the best score.  Sort of like Angry Birds but with more depth because your speed, weight, and car stats are a factor.  I've had some bugs though like the game will stop responding to inputs in build mode.  The workaround is to go into car edit mode then back to build mode.  Kind of annoying.  I like how the game saves the track I made on each level so I can go back and fine tune it.  The tracks you have to make to complete the objective and be pretty elaborate.  
The first person car camera view is pretty intense you're racing around in a giant room in a very tiny car which can cause motion sickness but I'm almost to the point where I can probably handle it.  I still use roomscale view with the annoying camera system.  It works ok.  If I were to take off any points it would be for the bugs and the annoying camera control.  But besides that it's a great game.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing and taking the time to leave some feedback! Your comments about the camera views are duly noted!

reviews.review_description: In what world does a car game without steering control make any sense? Literally all you can do is accelerate! Such a let down considering the track building is perfect.

developer_response.body: Hello! Thanks for trying out the game. The game's intention is to simulate the fun of slot-car racing and track building... hence the lack of steering controls. We're sorry to hear that it wasn't to your liking!

reviews.review_description:
This is probably the most boring game I've ever played.
I have to build the track myself in almost every game mode.
The controls are an absolute joke and really only consist of accelerating.
Bad controller input and just so boring!🥱

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you're not enjoying the game. If there is something specific you're finding difficult, let us know and we may be able to help.

reviews.review_description: Micro machines! Awesome!

developer_response.body: Thrilled to hear you're enjoying it. We certainly went back to our childhood memories when making it!

reviews.review_description: The kids like it so far very much and build one virtual racetrack after the other in our living room.😃👍

developer_response.body: Thank you! Awesome to hear your kids are having such a great time with it!

reviews.review_description:
Visuellement horrible, sur quest3 on voit les contrôleurs quest2 et c'est vraiment très moche.

Les musiques font mal a la tête tellement elles sont ignoble et répétitive. 

La voiture est acrochée au circuit et elle tourne toute seule. On gère juste l'accélération. 

En vue extérieur on voit même pas où est la voiture et en vue intérieur ça donne envie de vomir!

Rien à voir avec la licence micromachine. On dirait un jeu fait pas 2 amateurs. 

Si vous aimez la licence micromachine orientez vous plutôt vers Minimotor qui est excellent à coté de cette bouse.

developer_response.body:
Désolé d'apprendre que vous n'avez pas aimé jouer.

Il existe plusieurs options de caméra vers lesquelles vous pouvez basculer si la valeur par défaut vous met mal à l'aise.

Je suggère également d'essayer le mode MR si vous ne l'avez pas encore fait, les portails vous permettent de vous déplacer partout dans votre maison.

(Google Translate utilisé, excuses pour la mauvaise grammaire)

reviews.review_description:
This game is superbly made along several dimension. It is a delightful AR/MR construction game, and separately, a racing game, with a lot of fun abilities that your car can perform.

If you’re still on the fence, there are various discount code sites that you can google, such as metadog. Or just visit zzzzz🔘bio🔘link

PROS:
- crafting the track has some nice features, I like the way I can connect two straight parts with an S shaped up/down curve
- driving the car without the need for steering makes it a fast paced "train-like" game, which can be fun
- the VR environments are really nice

CONS:
- the "chase" and "in-car" camera views are making me sick, the race is too fast for these views I think
- when in "spectator" view, many tracks have parts which I can't see (they are covered or too high)
- the Mixed Reality feature has those "threats" that can't be turned OFF
- the portals don't always work... the car disappeared in one portal, but didn't appear in the other one.... and after like 20 seconds the car appeared in the first portal - this seems buggy

Anyway, I was hesitating asking for a refund, but with the discount code it wasn't that expensive, and I'd like to see if the developers fix the issues... Then I'd give a better rating. 😎

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the feedback on both what you enjoyed and your frustrations. 

For the portals, the car should come out of whichever portal you are looking at. Make sure you focus on your destination. If that's not working send us a support email (support@wimogames.com) or on discord so we can try to figure out what's wrong.

reviews.review_description: Did not expect the game to have almost all tracks not completed :/ also no multi-player.  Deff not what most of us were expecting.

developer_response.body:
Sorry to hear the game wasn't what you expected. It is a game focused on track building and a single player experience. 

The MR mode features a leaderboard that let you compete with other players asynchronously if you get the chance to try that.

reviews.review_description: So I pre ordered so I  got an extra car which I love but the actual game is like all your childhood memories of playing hot wheels and stuff in vr with extra challenges and all that. And even better it has MR so you can just set it up in your house and you can turn on a show make it has long and/or as short as you want and just have fun with it. Definitely worth the money. Also there’s some people saying like “there’s no multiplayer, I don’t like the music ect. The game just came out give em a little they will probably change that in some updates coming out late.

developer_response.body: Awesome to hear you're having so much fun with the game. Thanks for playing!

reviews.review_description: The game is very cool, but for some reason it crashes in mixed reality after 5 seconds and returns to the main menu, any ideas how to fix? I tried reinstall it - did not help

developer_response.body: Hi realdadline! Sorry about this... that's not how things should be! We'll look into it.

reviews.review_description: Purchased in June, played for a while and now says I didn't purchase on my account and need to buy again! Don't think so.

developer_response.body: Hmm this seems very strange. Perhaps it might be worthwhile reaching out to Meta about this. Unfortunately the store backend isn't anything we have control over, so there's not much we can do I'm afraid to say! 😢

reviews.review_description: Awesome the game is now working for me and is amazing, I really like it! Thank you for fixing my issue that quick, now I can access and play the game which is awesome, I will come back to add more details about the game but for now I am just going to enjoy it!

Ok I love this game the mixed reality building a massive track all round my room is amazing, however there is no option to turn off the traps, I want to whiz my car round my room on the track I just spent an hour building! But to do that I have to enable the traps then volcanos, boulders and ghosts, opening and closing doors all arrive to stop me! Give us an option to turn off the traps and just whizz round the room and I’ll edit to 5 stars

developer_response.body:
Thrilled to hear you're enjoying the game. 

A trap-free MR mode is a great suggestion. Our team will take a look at how we could add that in. Thanks for the idea!

reviews.review_description: Very good game
this isnt what i expected it is awful  there is nothing in it im hooked ahhh my money back bro

developer_response.body: Hello yoonboy. Sorry that the game wasn't to your liking! Thanks for giving it a try nonetheless.

reviews.review_description: Good game. Unfortunately the controls are terrible..

developer_response.body: Hello 51963, thanks for trying out the game! Sorry to hear that the controls weren't to your liking. It's intended to simulate slot-car racing and track building, so the racing controls are intentionally just accelaration, not steering. Hopefully you might come back to try again at some point!
